name: carotid_plaque_analysis_tool
description: Segments carotid plaque and vessel in paired longitudinal/transverse B-mode ultrasound HDF5 files. Returns segmentation masks and RADS vulnerability classification.

help.summary: Run carotid plaque segmentation and RADS vulnerability classification on a paired longitudinal/transverse B-mode ultrasound HDF5 file.

options.name: resize_target
options.description: Resize input images to this square resolution before inference.

notes: Input HDF5 file must contain 'long_img' and 'trans_img' datasets.
Output: segmentation masks (0=background, 1=plaque, 2=vessel) and RADS classification (Low-risk RADS 2 / High-risk RADS 3-4).
GPU recommended (~2s per case); CPU fallback supported (~30s per case).

runtime.notes: GPU recommended (~2s per case); CPU fallback supported (~30s per case)
